## Change summary from the Go repository PR
The following is the authoritative description of what changed in the Go repo.
Translate these changes into the Rust codebase so both repos stay in sync.

CHANGE_PLAN_PLACEHOLDER

## Current Rust source
RUST_CODE_PLACEHOLDER

Return ONLY a JSON object mapping relative file paths to their full updated content.
Example: {"src/main.rs": "fn main() { ... }", "src/queue.rs": "..."}
No markdown, no commentary, no code fences — raw JSON only.
If no changes are needed, return an empty JSON object: {}
